TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Bukai ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 250 buwan, 1,057 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 1,012 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 45 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 91%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bukai hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Bukai hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bukai hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Bukai hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Bukai hya' ga Sima-un. tay 'zil na Bukai hya' ga Qatu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βukai ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕima-un. taj ʔzil na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa qatu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Bukai ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 250 buwan, 1,057 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 1,012 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 45 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 91%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bukai hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Bukai hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bukai hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Bukai hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Bukai hya' ga Sima-un. tay 'zil na Bukai hya' ga Qatu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βukai ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕima-un. taj ʔzil na βukai ħjaʔ ɣa qatu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
